autodiscover.title: Find controller automatically
autodiscover.description: Scans the Homebridge host's current local IPv4 subnets when Controller address is empty. A configured address always takes precedence.

host.title: Controller address
host.description: Fixed AiSEG2 IP address or hostname. Leave empty to use local discovery.

password.title: Controller password
password.description: Password used to login to the Panasonic AiSEG2 controller

groupAirPurifierSensors.title: Attach air purifier sensors to purifier
groupAirPurifierSensors.description: Marks each air purifier as the primary HomeKit service and links its air quality sensors and mode switches to it.

groupAirConditionerSensors.title: Attach air conditioner sensors to AC
groupAirConditionerSensors.description: Marks each air conditioner as the primary HomeKit service and links its indoor humidity, outdoor temperature, fan, humidity, and extra mode services to it.

groupAirEnvironmentSensors.title: Pair temperature and humidity sensors
groupAirEnvironmentSensors.description: Marks each temperature service as the primary HomeKit service and links its paired humidity sensor to it.

groupEcocuteServices.title: Attach EcoCute services to water heater
groupEcocuteServices.description: Marks the manual water-heating switch as the primary HomeKit service and links automatic bath and temperature services to it.

exposeContactSensorLockState.title: Show window lock state sensors
exposeContactSensorLockState.description: Adds a read-only Contact Sensor service to window lock sensors when AiSEG2 reports lock state data.

echonetDiscovery.title: Log discovered ECHONET devices
echonetDiscovery.description: Logs ECHONET Lite devices found by multicast and unicast probing. This is diagnostic only and does not change AiSEG2 control behavior.

echonetSubnets.title: Diagnostic scan targets
echonetSubnets.description: Optional comma-separated /24 to /32 IPv4 targets for ECHONET Lite discovery, for example 192.168.20.0/24. Leave empty to scan the Homebridge host's current local IPv4 subnets.

enabled.title: Use direct control when available
enabled.description: Enables direct ECHONET Lite status/control for automatically matched shutters, door locks, air purifiers, and EcoCute devices. AiSEG2 remains the discovery source.

subnets.title: Device scan targets
subnets.description: Optional comma-separated /24 to /32 IPv4 targets, for example 192.168.20.0/24. Leave empty to scan the Homebridge host's current local IPv4 subnets.

preferDoorLocks.title: Use direct control for door locks

preferAirPurifiers.title: Use direct control for air purifiers

fallbackToAiseg.title: Retry through AiSEG2 if direct control fails
fallbackToAiseg.description: If enabled, matched shutters, door locks, and air purifiers retry through AiSEG2 when direct ECHONET Lite requests fail. EcoCute direct control requires ECHONET Lite.

doorLockHosts.title: Advanced door lock host overrides
doorLockHosts.description: Manual fallback map from AiSEG2 door lock display name to HF-JA1/JA2 IP address. Normal installs should leave this unset; automatic matching is used first.

enabled.title: Show solar/battery status sensors
enabled.description: Adds Detected/Not Detected status services for Solar Surplus, Battery Ready, Battery Discharging, and EcoCute Good Time, plus a Battery service when storage battery data is available. Raw W/kWh values are logged only.

enabled.title: Enable Homepage status API
enabled.description: Starts a read-only local JSON endpoint for Homepage customapi widgets. It does not create Apple Home accessories.

publicHost.title: URL host
publicHost.description: Host or IP used when showing the generated URL, for example 192.168.50.111.

token.title: Secret token
token.description: Secret URL token. Leave empty to auto-generate and persist one.

ecocuteName.title: EcoCute device
ecocuteName.description: Optional AiSEG2 EcoCute display name. Leave empty to expose all EcoCute devices and use the first one for Homepage summary fields.

weatherEnabled.title: Include weather forecast
weatherEnabled.description: Adds Open-Meteo forecast fields using shortwave radiation, cloud cover, and precipitation probability.

emergencyHotWaterLiters.title: Emergency hot water threshold (L)
emergencyHotWaterLiters.description: Homepage prediction only: marks emergency heating as needed below this remaining hot water level.

nightFallbackTime.title: Night fallback time
nightFallbackTime.description: Homepage prediction only: wall-clock time shown for the cheap-rate fallback heating plan.

nightFallbackHotWaterLiters.title: Night fallback hot water threshold (L)
nightFallbackHotWaterLiters.description: Homepage prediction only: night fallback is shown as pending below this remaining hot water level.

nightFallbackWhenNextSolarBlocked.title: Night fallback when next solar window is blocked
nightFallbackWhenNextSolarBlocked.description: Homepage prediction only: marks the 01:00 fallback as pending when the next solar heating window is forecast to be cloudy or rainy.

enabled.title: Enable automatic start
enabled.description: Automatically starts manual EcoCute water heating when solar, battery, weather, and time-window conditions are met. It never sends stop.

dryRun.title: Log only, do not start heating
dryRun.description: Logs when EcoCute would be started without sending the command.

ecocuteName.title: EcoCute device
ecocuteName.description: Optional AiSEG2 EcoCute display name. Leave empty only when exactly one EcoCute exists.

allowedStartTime.title: Earliest start time
allowedStartTime.description: Local HH:mm time when automation may start.

allowedEndTime.title: Latest start time
allowedEndTime.description: Local HH:mm time after which automation will not start.

requireBatteryNotDischarging.title: Do not start while battery is discharging

minBatteryChargeWatts.title: Minimum battery charging power (W)
minBatteryChargeWatts.description: Optional stricter gate. Keep 0 to allow standby/low charging when other conditions are good.

weatherEnabled.title: Check weather forecast before starting
weatherEnabled.description: Adds an Open-Meteo forecast gate using shortwave radiation, cloud cover, and precipitation probability.

latitude.title: Weather latitude
latitude.description: Use the custom settings UI location button to fill this from browser geolocation.

longitude.title: Weather longitude
longitude.description: Use the custom settings UI location button to fill this from browser geolocation.

enabled.title: Enable webhook server
enabled.description: Starts a local HTTP endpoint for POST requests such as UniFi fingerprint triggers.

publicHost.title: URL host
publicHost.description: Host or IP used only when logging the generated URL, for example 192.168.50.111.

token.title: Secret token
token.description: Secret URL token. Leave empty to auto-generate and persist one; the generated URL is printed in the Homebridge log.

method.title: Accepted method
method.description: HTTP method accepted by the webhook endpoint. POST is safer; use GET only for integrations that cannot send POST.

action.title: Action on trigger
action.description: Unlock only always requests unlock. Toggle unlocks when locked and locks when unlocked.

doorLockName.title: Target door lock
doorLockName.description: Optional AiSEG2 door lock display name. Leave empty when only one door lock exists.

cooldownSeconds.title: Duplicate event cooldown (seconds)
cooldownSeconds.description: Ignores repeated webhook posts for this many seconds to avoid duplicate fingerprint events toggling the lock back.
